title: Entry point for facility-level testing ValueSet Display Values
description: Display values for Entry point for facility-level testing ValueSet ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

HIV.D.DE747.en: Provider-initiated tested in a clinic or emergency facility

HIV.D.DE749.en: Voluntary counselling and testing (within a health facility setting)
